title: SnipZen Platform
description: A developer productivity tool with a VSCode extension & Web app to manage, sync, and reuse code snippets.
keyFeatures: VSCode Extension to import & export snippets directly from VSCode
Sync Snippets & Environment Snapshots across multiple devices
Advanced search with filters for language, tags, and users
Secure Authentication with JWT & personal access tokens
Infinite scrolling with cursor-based pagination for fast search
